bird.name: Grey-crowned crocias
bird.summary: The grey-crowned crocias (Laniellus langbianis) is a passerine bird in the family Leiothrichidae. It is endemic to Vietnam, where it has a…

relations.subject: Grey-crowned crocias
relations.evidence: | editor2-link=Leslie Christidis | year=2014 | title=The Howard & Moore Complete Checklist of the Birds of the World | volume=2: Passerines | edition=4th | place=Eastbourne, UK | publisher=Aves Press | isbn=978-0-9568611-2-2 | page=548 }} It is threatened by habitat loss, although the species is elusive and easily overlooked, so much so that it was previously considered critically endangered
